zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Robert de Brent於大約1250年出生在英國薩默塞特可希頓時，他的父親Sir Robert de Brent32歲，母親Mrs. Millicent De Brent34歲。他與Isabella de Montague在英國維爾爾索爾茲伯里結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1358年在英國英格蘭薩默塞特格拉斯頓波瑞享年110歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭薩默塞特可希頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Robert de Brent于大约1250年出生在英国薩默塞特可希頓时，他的父亲Sir Robert de Brent32岁，母亲Mrs. Millicent De Brent34岁。他与Isabella de Montague在英国維爾爾索爾茲伯里结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1358年在英国英格兰薩默塞特格拉斯頓波瑞享年110岁，埋葬在英国英格兰薩默塞特可希頓。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Brent
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from East Brent in Somerset or South Brent in Devon, both named from Old English brente ‘steep place’, referring to the steep hills on which they stand. Compare Brents .
History: Giles Brent came from Gloucestershire, England, to MD in 1638.

variants.name: Brunt
meanings: English (Midlands and Wales): habitational name from Brund in Staffordshire or from some other place called from a burnt clearing (Middle English brend ‘burned’). In placenames Brund- and Brunt- are to some extent interchangeable with Brent .
English: nickname from Middle English brund, brunt, brond, metathesized forms of burned, burnt ‘burnt’, perhaps with reference to branding as a punishment for a crime. Compare Brent .

variants.name: Brents
meanings: Altered form of English Brent , with the addition of excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Robert de Brent was born about 1250, in Cossington, Somerset, England, his father, Sir Robert de Brent, was 32 and his mother, Mrs. Millicent De Brent, was 34. He married Isabella de Montague in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died about 1358, in Glastonbury, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 110, and was buried in Cossington, Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Robert de Brent est né environ 1250, à Cossington, Somerset, Angleterre, son père, Sir Robert de Brent, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Millicent De Brent, avait 34 ans. Il a épousé Isabella de Montague à Salisbury, Wiltshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé environ 1358, à Glastonbury, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 110 ans, et a été enterré à Cossington, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Robert de Brent um 1250 in Cossington, Somerset, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Robert de Brent 32 und seine Mutter Mrs. Millicent De Brent 34. Er hat in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England Isabella de Montague geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb um 1358 im Alter von 110 Jahren in Glastonbury, Somerset, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Cossington, Somerset, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert de Brent è nato il circa 1250 nel Cossington, Somerset, England, il suo padre, Sir Robert de Brent, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Mrs. Millicent De Brent, aveva 34 anni. Lui sposato Isabella de Montague nel Salisbury, Wiltshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì circa 1358, nel Glastonbury, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 110 anni, e fu sepolto a Cossington, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Robert de Brentが約1250年にイギリスソメルセトコシントンで生まれた時，父Sir Robert de Brentは32歳，母Mrs. Millicent De Brentは34歳であった。イギリスウィルトシュアイアサリスブリーでIsabella de Montagueと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は約1358年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトグラストンブリーで110歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスソメルセトコシントンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Robert de Brent(이)가 대략 1250년 영국 서머세트 코징턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Robert de Brent(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. Millicent De Brent(은)는 34세였다. 그는 영국 윌츠히르 살리스버이에서 Isabella de Montague(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1358년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 글라스토버이에서 110세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 코징턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert de Brent nasceu aproximadamente 1250, em Cossington, Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Robert de Brent, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Millicent De Brent, tinha 34 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabella de Montague em Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1358, em Glastonbury, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 110 anos, e foi sepultado em Cossington, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Robert de Brent родился около 1250 г. в местности коссингтон, сомирсет, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Robert de Brent было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Millicent De Brent, 34. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabella de Montague в местности салисбури, уилцхир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер около 1358 г. в местности гластонбури, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 110 лет и был похоронен в местности коссингтон, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания.
